name: honest-scope validator fails when SPACE README is missing the self-observation caveat sentence
command: mkdir -p tmp-readme && printf '# SPACE\nA dashboard\n' > tmp-readme/README.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/honest-scope-validate.sh" --readme tmp-readme/README.md 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*self-observation' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
